entries.display_name: Chorus Community Health Plans (fka Children's Community Health Plan)
entries.reason: Official portal present but no importable public FHIR base confirmed.
entries.note: Official Chorus developer page exposes Provider Directory documentation through a JavaScript app, but no importable public FHIR base has been confirmed.

entries.reason: Official portal requires a user token and no open public FHIR base is confirmed.
entries.note: Official First Medical developer portal lists Practitioner and Location APIs under a user-token security model; no open importable Provider Directory FHIR base has been confirmed.
